text.title: Experiment Ledger Discipline Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure spanning entry open → ship → result → close → archive.

step.name: open-entry
step.action: Create entry with status="proposed", producer + consumer + decision_fed populated, tag from frozen taxonomy.
step.decision-gate: If consumer or decision_fed missing, do not create.

step.name: ship
step.action: Transition to status="shipped"; populate variants array; record cycle_id.

step.name: record-result
step.action: Populate result field with effect size + p-value + n. Do NOT close yet.

step.name: close-with-learning
step.action: Write learning_summary ≥ 80 chars. Confirm tags ⊂ frozen taxonomy. Set status="closed", closed_at.
step.decision-gate: If learning_summary < 80 chars or empty, block close.

step.name: supersede-on-invalidation
step.input: Existing closed entry + new test result that invalidates it
step.action: Create NEW entry with prev_entry_id = old.entry_id; set old.superseded_by = new.entry_id. Do not modify old's result.
